segment_summary: This segment demonstrates migrating a .NET project to a new version of an isolation component. The speaker first shows how to update NuGet packages and modify the `DbContext` to inherit from `BusinessIsolationDbContext`, implementing required override methods. He then updates the constructor to accept an `IIsolationClaimsProvider`. After configuring the isolation level for entities and registering the middleware, he encounters a migration error due to missing `TenantId` and `InstanceId` in seeded data, which he resolves by adding GUIDs. Finally, he shows the generated migration file with the new columns and begins to explain the migration process for an existing project using an older version of the component.
